Australian metascience, by research strand

Co-authorship among Australia-based metascience researchers, coloured by research strand and embedded in the international leaders they publish with. Australia-based researchers show at full colour; international collaborators are faded. Squares are international leaders. Every cross-tier link is a verified OpenAlex co-authorship.
